Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Regarding A Minor, Matthew Heydari
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Quinton B. Cutlip, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Gina Heydari, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Matthew Heydari, present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $150,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $50,000.00 payable to The Dolan Law Firm.
Reimbursement for Medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of: $4,124.00
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $54,124.00

A net balance of $95,877.00 to be disburse as follows:
$95,877.00 to be paid in the form of structured settlement as set forth in attachment 7c(2)(b).

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise.

Status Hearing Scheduled on August 11, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the purchase of annuity. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Regarding A Minor, Samantha Heydari
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Quinton B. Cutlip, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Gina Heydari, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Samantha Heydari, present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $2,645,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $881,666 payable to The Dolan Law Firm.
Reimbursement for Medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of: $47,399.00
Midical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the total amount of: 23,508
San Francisco General Hospital Office of Treasurer and Tax Collector - City and County of San Francisco. P.O. Box 7426, San Francisco, CA 94120 $23,509.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amount of $150,000.00 OPTUM SUBROGATION SERVICES - Subrogation service provider ofr selt funded ERISA lien by Oracle, Inc. at Optum, attn: Sandra Harsh 75 Remittance Drive, Suite 6019
Chicago, IL 60675-6019
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $1,102,574.00
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $5,833.33
A net balance of $1,542,426.00 to be disburse as follows:
$50,616.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at CITIBANK, Sunnyvale, CA.
$1,471,810.00 to be paid in the form of structured settlement as set forth in attachment 7c(2)(b).
$20,000.00 to be used to purchase a 529 College Plan through the California Uniform Transfer to Minot's Act.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise and Order to deposit money into blocked account.

Status Hearing Scheduled on August 11, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
